ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief description of the issue or request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., bug report, feature request) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the ticket (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component associated with the ticket */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was last updated */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to this ticket */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was resolved */,
  "resolution_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the resolution */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue (e.g., critical, major, minor) */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "estimated_effort" INTEGER /* Estimated effort required to resolve the ticket */,
  "remaining_effort" INTEGER /* Remaining effort required to resolve the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., FileZilla Client, FileZilla Server) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer for this component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, tester) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the user (e.g., lead developer, project lead) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ticket type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ticket type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was added */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the attachment is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attachment */,
  "uploaded_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment (e.g., image, document, zip) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the activity is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., status change, comment added) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_versions" (
  "ticket_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket-version association */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related ticket */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software version */,
  "affected_version" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the version was affected by the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_versions_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_tags" (
  "ticket_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket-tag association */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related ticket */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_tags_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)
